messages.subject: [R-jobs] Principal / staff statistical programmer at Aetion in NYC or LA
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] Principal / staff statistical programmer at Aetion in NYC or LA
messages.body_plain:
For those interested Aetion, www.aetion.com, is hiring for a new
statistical programmer position located in NYC or LA. This role will
be supporting the growth of the Aetion Evidence Platform (AEP) as the
platform of choice for generating regulatory grade real world evidence
for the life sciences and other key healthcare stakeholders.

As the Principal / Staff Statistical Programmer you will be leading
the strategic development and execution of core statistical
functionalities of Aetion?s platform by managing a team of statistical
programmers and data scientists. You will work closely with our
Product and Science team in driving the design and scientific
verification of the Aetion platform and developing test cases and code
to validate new features using R. In this role you will work at the
intersection of science and engineering, striving to ensure a seamless
integration between the two competence areas within the company.

Please see the complete job description,
https://boards.greenhouse.io/aetion/jobs/3356249, and apply through
our website if interested. Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Braley Crandall
Vice President, Product
(323) 447-0457
Aetion | aetion.com

-- 
This message and any included attachments are confidential. If you are not 
the intended recipient, please reply to?the sender that you received the 
message in error and delete it without further distribution.
